dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6943 IH: Veterans Burial Allowance and Reimbursement Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Evans of Colorado introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to standardize the payment of burial and funeral expenses and plot allowances for deceased veterans under the laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Veterans Burial Allowance and Reimbursement Act of 2026.

section.header: Standardization of certain burial benefits available under laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs

subsection.text: Section 2303 of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking the heading and inserting Deceased veterans: burial and funeral expenses; plot allowance;

subparagraph.text: by striking who is not covered by section 2307 of this title and;
by redesignating subparagraphs (A) through (C) as subparagraphs (B) through (D), respectively; and
by inserting before subparagraph (B), as so redesignated, the following new subparagraph:
The deceased veteran dies as a result of a service-connected disability or disabilities.

paragraph.text: in subsection (d), by striking subparagraph (B) or (C) and inserting subparagraph (C) or (D).

subsection.text: Section 2307 of such title is repealed.

paragraph.text: in section 2303(b)(1)(B)(ii), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and;

clause.text: by striking in subparagraph (B) or (C) and inserting subparagraph (C) or (D); and
by striking , or pursuant to section 2307 of this title,; and

subparagraph.text: in subsection (b), by striking subsection (a)(2)(C) and inserting subsection (a)(2)(D); and

paragraph.text: in section 5101, by striking sections 2303, 2307, and 5121 and inserting sections 2303 and 5121.
